message:
Harden CLI + dedupe useLocalStorage hook

- Add exit code 1 when install/uninstall fails in JSON mode
- Deduplicate useLocalStorage: use-local-storage.ts now re-exports from useLocalStorage.ts
- Update BundleCard and PromptCard to use named React imports

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-z1j
